message:
feat(demo): Esc cascade, Ctrl+I inspector, data_viz keybindings (bd-iuvb.17.5)

Esc now closes overlays in reverse render order (evidence ledger → perf
HUD → debug → help → a11y), Ctrl+I toggles the evidence inspector, and
data_viz gains Space (pause) and r (reset) shortcuts bringing it to 4
keybindings. Adds consumes_text_input guard so q/? don't fire in editor
screens. 9 new unit tests, snapshot updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
